listitem.para: a n-by-1 or 1-by-n matrix of doubles, integer value, positive, the number of levels for each factor j, for j=1,2,...,n

a m-by-n matrix of doubles, the experiments, where m=prod(levels). For j=1,2,...,n and i=1,2,...,m, and the entry B(i,j) is the level of the experiment #i for the variable #j. For a given variable j=1,2,...,n, the entries B(:,j) are in the set {1,2,...,level(j)}.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Computes a full factorial design with prescribed number of levels for each factor. In other words, for each factor j, the number of levels is levels(j), for j=1,2,...,n.

refsection.title: Examples
